programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Mayor Quimby insults the French government, who launch a neutron bomb in retaliation. Homer escapes the blast and finds himself alone in Springfield.

programs.title: Hollyoaks
programs.desc: Things take a shocking turn as tensions rise between Sienna and Cleo. Diane tries to enjoy every moment with her family. And a resident faces a choice between their family and their career.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programs.desc: In the ultimate 'here's what you could've won', the participants meet their alternate matches. And it turns out to be pretty interesting..

programs.title: Celebs Go Dating
programs.desc: Can Gabby Allen overcome her reservations on her first date? Professor Green and Coleen Nolan have heartfelt moments. And Lucinda Light meets a golfer.

programs.title: Gogglebox
programs.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching: The Traitors, Gino's Cooking Up Love, Lady Chatterley's Lover, I Can See Your Voice, Blowing LA and White Christmas.

programs.title: First Dates
programs.desc: Lee from Leigh meets the girl of his dreams but forgets her name. And in a First Dates first, a mum and son, Jane and Bobby, visit the restaurant together, each looking for love.
